pi_items.source: Counted the number of test cases (functions starting with 'test_') in tests/test_engine.py generated in setup_task.sh.
verifier.py requires a score >= 70 to pass.

privileged_info_summary: The project is located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/feature_flags. There are exactly 11 tests in the test suite, contradicting the claim of 20 tests. The passing threshold score is 70 out of 100.
